evaluation.summary: The experiment confirms Chebyshev bias modulo 210 with non-residue classes averaging 7263.33 primes versus 7241.50 for quadratic residues, but the chi-square test shows perfect fit to uniform model (p=1.0), revealing a methodological contradiction that undermines the statistical framework.
next_directions: Reconcile the apparent contradiction between observed bias and perfect goodness-of-fit p-value
Implement proper variance estimation accounting for correlation between residue classes
Extend to q=2310 as originally proposed and validate against established Chebyshev bias literature
